/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pisya.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/pisya.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pisya.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pisya.dir/src/ai_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pisya.dir/src/tools.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pisya.dir/src/agent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pisya.dir/src/ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pisya.dir/src/session.cpp.o -o pisya  /usr/lib/libreadline.so
